zh: 我已经学英语学了三年了。
en: I have been studying English for three years.

zh: 她一直在等你。
en: She has been waiting for you.

zh: 他们一直在讨论这个问题。
en: They have been discussing this problem.

zh: 我一直在找我的钥匙。
en: I have been looking for my keys.

zh: 他一直在练习弹钢琴。
en: He has been practicing the piano.

zh: 她一直在哭。
en: She has been crying.

zh: 我们一直在努力工作。
en: We have been working hard.

zh: 他一直在跑步，所以很累。
en: He has been running, so he is tired.

zh: 你一直在做什么？
en: What have you been doing?

zh: 她一直在学习吗？
en: Has she been studying?

zh: 是的，她一直在学习。
en: Yes, she has.

zh: 不，她没有一直在学习。
en: No, she has not.

zh: 他们一直在建造这座桥。
en: They have been building this bridge.

zh: 我一直在思考这个问题。
en: I have been thinking about this problem.

zh: 她一直在节食。
en: She has been dieting.

zh: 我已经在这里等了两个小时了。
en: I have been waiting here for two hours.

zh: 她自从早上就一直在工作。
en: She has been working since morning.

zh: 他们已经谈了三个小时了。
en: They have been talking for three hours.

zh: 自从上个月以来，他一直在学习游泳。
en: He has been learning to swim since last month.

zh: 我们已经排队等了一个小时了。
en: We have been queuing for an hour.

zh: 自从她搬来以后，她一直在适应新环境。
en: She has been adapting to the new environment since she moved here.

zh: 他已经在这家公司工作了十年了。
en: He has been working in this company for ten years.

zh: 自从毕业以来，她一直在找工作。
en: She has been looking for a job since she graduated.

zh: 他们已经争论了好几天了。
en: They have been arguing for several days.

zh: 自从上周以来，他一直在发烧。
en: He has been having a fever since last week.

zh: 她的眼睛红红的，因为她一直在哭。
en: Her eyes are red because she has been crying.

zh: 他满身是汗，因为他一直在锻炼。
en: He is sweaty because he has been exercising.

zh: 地板很脏，因为孩子们一直在玩泥巴。
en: The floor is dirty because the children have been playing with mud.

zh: 她很疲惫，因为她一直在加班。
en: She is exhausted because she has been working overtime.

zh: 房间里烟雾弥漫，因为有人一直在抽烟。
en: The room is smoky because someone has been smoking.
